name: frontier_market
description: Battle Market hall clear (q.side_frontier_hall lane): Merchant Vance and Trader Fiona (one_time daily-roster challengers, defeat tags via TBCS onwin), then Market Mogul Sterling (brain, battle button gated all_tags on both defeats) whose on_win runs frontier/hall_cleared and tags frontier_market_cleared. The champion gate is opened by tag surgery (royal_league_champion - gate.champion lowers to that player tag); stripped in cleanup. NOTE the market group is CO-LOCATED on the Port cluster (casting brief: both at 'Battle Frontier - Battle Port'; shipped RCT coords put the market line at z2993.5, brain z2999.5 - the Port trio sits ~5b away at z2990.5/2996.5, all inside one find_npc radius). Full display-name needles keep matches unique - beware the 'Stern'/'Sterling' stem collision: 'Captain Stern' and 'Market Mogul Sterling' both contain 'Stern', so never shorten those needles. Fights under dev-bot autobattle with 2x lv-100 Garchomp (Sterling fights at the ceiling - 'level hundred, no discount'). Site is inside the frontier_active region-tick AABB (Nuzlocke faint paths suspended); atlas re-survey open, hence _probe_pending. KNOWN CAVEAT: intermittent TBCS battle-init stall / rare showdown wedge - a win-wait timeout is almost certainly that, not a hall regression; re-run before filing.

steps.comment: -- preamble: close any leftover dialog, sweep a stale battle --

-- tp FIRST (loaded chunks for the kill sweep + the 40b latches spawn Vance/Fiona/Sterling on a fresh world). Coordinate is the shipped RCT market stall line (ch1 3797.5 / ch2 3803.5 at z2993.5, brain 3800.5 z2999.5), stood 2b north - _probe_pending until the first live run confirms the floor --

steps.comment_: plateau is outside any safe zone; frontier_active only suspends Nuzlocke faint paths, not real mob damage

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): every tag this scenario or its battles set, plus the champion gate surgery. No latch resets - the bodies persist and are never killed here --

steps.comment_: gate.champion lowers to this player tag; stripped in cleanup
band_tags must re-derive the no_* inverses after the removals before any dialog opens

steps.comment: -- lane sanity: champion gate open, nothing defeated, hall uncleared --
-- party reset: junk parties stall TBCS battle init (verified live). Empty all six slots, then 2x lv-100 Garchomp --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=100
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=100
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment: -- beat 1: Merchant Vance, the morning fresh catch. say[] rotates, so the screen assert targets the stable battle-button label (its rendering IS the champion-gate assert) --

steps.comment_: battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side (autobattle) while the stale dialog stays up
Vance's onwin win_line say; a timeout here is almost certainly the TBCS stall, not a regression
battle teardown settle before the next TBCS dispatch
battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side
battle teardown settle + band_tags window before the brain's all_tags gate is read

steps.comment: -- beat 3: Market Mogul Sterling. His battle button gates all_tags on both challenger defeats - it rendering now IS the ladder assert. Win chain: prize -> frontier_market_cleared tag -> win say -> frontier/hall_cleared (actionbar) --

steps.comment_: battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side
frontier/hall_cleared actionbar - fires from Sterling's on_win right after the win say

steps.comment: -- beat 4: cleared-state dialog - Sterling's beaten entry (prio 20, gate frontier_market_cleared) preempts; prose any-of covers all three rotating say lines (including the late-tier half-recognition beat) --

expect_screen_text: The harbormaster of this dock is you now, whether you wanted the title or not. Fresh challengers still arrive every dawn - they will be arriving for you.

I ran a fair market for a long time after the old owners stopped watching. You closed it cleaner than they ever did. There is a doorstep past the last generated ridge with your name on it. Go find it.
I half know that face, and I will keep the half I know to myself. Enough of us do. The Market is yours - and so is anything the tide still brings in to sell.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: strip everything this scenario set so no other scenario inherits the lane; CD prizes ride (the prize rail has no reset) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
